author: British Bakels
title: Pumpkin Spice S’Mores
instructions_list: Scale cookie mix and margarine into a mixer and beat until fat is dispersed evenly.
Add water and mix on slow until a dough forms.
(Optional: blend in pumpkin spice powder at this stage for spiced biscuits.)
Shape into 60 g pucks, place evenly spaced on trays.
Allow to cool on tray until set.
Fold pumpkin spice powder into Ready-to-Use Mallow until evenly dispersed.
Pipe or spread a layer of spiced mallow onto the flat side of one biscuit.
Drizzle or spread a little melted dark chocolate over the mallow.
Optionally finish with an extra drizzle of dark chocolate across the top for decoration.
